purpose: Re-run STT-P5 Silero VAD browser proof after setup CTA proof-harness hardening.

codeUnderTest.note: This branch was used only for proof. It was not merged to main.

commands.manualServer: set -a; . frontend/.env.production; set +a; VITE_AUTH_MODE=real pnpm dev
commands.browserProof: STT_AUTH=fresh STT_MODES=private STT_FIXTURES=h1_6 STT_INJECT_MIC_AUDIO=true STT_PRIVATE_VAD=1 STT_CORPUS_OUT=/private/tmp/stt-p5-vad-current-main-h1_6.json HEADLESS=true BASE_URL=http://localhost:5174 node scripts/manual-stt-corpus-proof.mjs

browserProof.truth: They, like, told wild tales to frighten him.
browserProof.transcript: Day. Like, told Wild Tales to frighten him.
browserProof.detailTranscript: Day. Like, told Wild Tales to frighten him.

consoleAndNetworkSignals.notableSignal: The browser still requested /onnxruntime/ort-wasm-simd-threaded.jsep.mjs?import and the VAD telemetry still reports RMS fallback.

result.why: The proof reached recording, stop, save, history/detail, but Silero VAD never produced runtime version, speech probabilities, or speech segments and fell back to RMS.
result.nextDevAsk: Fix VAD runtime/model activation so vadFellBackToRms=false and vadRuntimeVersion, vadMeanSpeechProb, and vadSpeechSegments are populated. Then rerun RMS-vs-VAD A/B.
